source_cluster.cluster_title_candidate: 8000万桶原油，准备通过霍尔木兹海峡
heat_reasons: 同一主題被 3 個來源報導
包含高權重來源 CNBC 與 華爾街見聞
涵蓋 商品、地緣政治 類別
涉及 Iran、Middle East、oil、制裁 等重要市場關鍵詞

articles.title: Oil prices under new wave of pressure amid lingering questions over a Strait of Hormuz reopening
articles.snippet: A flurry of headlines on Friday point to an increasingly fragile deal between the U.S. and Iran.

articles.title: Oil tanker traffic in Strait of Hormuz jumps after U.S. and Iran implement deal to open sea lane
articles.snippet: The U.S.-Iran deal has raised questions about how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends.

articles.title: 8000万桶原油，准备通过霍尔木兹海峡
articles.snippet: 波斯湾40艘超级油轮上约8000万桶非受制裁原油已蓄势待发，部分船只率先尝试通行，有望缓解亚洲炼厂因前期局势导致的断供与库存压力；但行业组织警告水雷等重大安全风险依然存在，全面复航仍具不确定性。

articles.title: U.S.-Iran deal in photos: ships in the Strait of Hormuz, daily life in Tehran
articles.snippet: The first signs of a post-war recovery are emerging across the Middle East after the United States and Iran signed a memorandum aimed at ending the conflict.

articles.title: OPEC chief dismisses IEA supply glut forecast as 'critical' Strait of Hormuz reopens
articles.snippet: The IEA said on Wednesday that a lasting resolution to the conflict could drive a surge in supply volumes and trigger a major oil overhang next year.

source_cluster.cluster_title_candidate: 伊朗否认霍尔木兹关闭，暂免通行费但未来或加收保险费，美军称20余船已通过海峡
heat_reasons: 目前主要由單一來源報導
包含高權重來源 華爾街見聞
涵蓋 地緣政治 類別

articles.title: 伊朗否认霍尔木兹关闭，暂免通行费但未来或加收保险费，美军称20余船已通过海峡
articles.snippet: 伊朗管理霍尔木兹海峡的机构称，美伊谈判60天内免除海峡通行费；自本周五起，所有经过海峡船舶必须至少提前48小时向伊方提交过境申请；所有通过海峡船只必须办理一项强制性保险，该保险目前免费，未来可能收费。
